instruction: 基于官方 heatmap 示例（ew radar），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This demo provides two examples of using the heat map capability of the perception processor. The heatmap_commander_demo.txt is the main run file demonstrating a commander with a heat map that is fed by subordinates and used to issue search jobs. - The default setup for the scenario has two incoming red aircraft and one blue search aircraft. - The platform availability block can be used to add an escort or additional red aircraft.。覆盖组件：Comm, Coverage, ElectronicWarfare, Platform, Processor, Sensor, Task。

基于官方 orwaca_iads 示例（launch tbm processor），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。The startup file "orwaca_northern_area.txt"  only has the sams in the states of Washington and Oregon. The startup file "orwaca_full_area.txt" has the additional SAMs located in the state of California. You must use the new icons that have "_icon" in the name or all of the platforms will look like stop signs when looking at replay files. The "orwaca_full_iads_coverage.JPG" image file (located in jpg subdirectory) shows the geographical locations of the sam sites.。覆盖组件：Ballistic, Coverage, ElectronicWarfare, IADS, Platform, Processor, Weapon。

基于官方 new_guidance 示例（common），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This demo directory illustrates the use of the WSF_GUIDED_MOVER as well as the WSF_GUIDANCE_COMPUTER. A weapon is given the mover and processor to precisely control its flyout.。覆盖组件：Comm, ElectronicWarfare, Guidance, Mover, Processor, Weapon。

基于官方 wargame 示例（white cell view），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This scenario is a demonstration of a simple wargame using Warlock. The scenario is best experienced with multiple players to take control of the four playable teams. The four teams, while of different colors, should have identical assets. Each player's team has available two fighters, a sam, a bomber, a sensor drone and a base. The objective is for a player to use their assets to the best of their ability to destroy the opposing player's bases, while also defending their own. On start up, assets will follow predefined routes until directed otherwise. Upon the loss of a base, a player will lose their remaining platforms in the scenario and receive a "Game Over" message. The last player with their base。覆盖组件：Comm, ElectronicWarfare, Platform, Route, Sensor, Weapon。

基于官方 ballistic_missile_shootdown 示例（common），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。Any resemblance or approximations to actual weapon system capabilities in this demo are purely coincidental.  The intent of this demo is to illustrate how to setup a processor to launch an anti-ballistic missile at sometime in the future to intercept a ballistic missile.。覆盖组件：Ballistic, Comm, Processor, Task, Weapon。

基于官方 sensor_plot 示例（fpa-route），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This directory holds examples for use by the sensor_plot tool in AFSIM. These are examples of how to setup and use sensor_plot for the more common uses. See the doc folder for descriptions of how to run these examples, their output formats, and how to view the output. For more information on how to setup and modify the input files see the documentation.。覆盖组件：Comm, ElectronicWarfare, Route, Sensor, Swarm。

基于官方 aea_iads 示例（commander track manager），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This directory contains the necessary files to test the EW effects in a scenario similar to the iads_demo baseline scenario. The SOJ and EW_Radar have EA and EP techniques, respectively, with them to aid in the testing and verification of these techniques.。覆盖组件：Comm, ElectronicWarfare, IADS, Sensor。

基于官方 air_to_air 示例（esm），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This is a collection of several demos that demonstrate air-to-air combat using the SA Processor and Advanced Behavior Trees (ABTs). The following demos are included (all demos use the Brawler mover (WSF_BRAWLER_MOVER), unless otherwise indicated):。覆盖组件：ElectronicWarfare, Mover, Processor, Sensor。

基于官方 alv_routing 示例（ew radar site），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。Loosely made on the Air-Launch-Vehicle (ALV) made to loosely represent a MALD-like capability (See references to unclassified sources in the two txt files).。覆盖组件：ElectronicWarfare, Platform, Sensor, Weapon。

基于官方 ballistic 示例（event output），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This demo illustrates how to create a script to launch various weapons. Since the processor is a SCRIPT_PROCESSOR, the TRACK variable is not available as it would be if a TASK_PROCESSOR would have been used. Variables can be changed in the scenario file to launch at a specific。覆盖组件：Ballistic, Processor, Task, Weapon。

基于官方 behavior_tree 示例（selector engage weapon task target），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This directory contains scenarios to demonstrate advanced behavior trees and their visualization in the Mystic behavior tree view.  Info on each。覆盖组件：ElectronicWarfare, Processor, Task, Weapon。
基于 AFSIM 官方 brawler 示例文件 behavior_engage_weapon_task_target.txt，生成对应的场景脚本。覆盖组件：Mover, Processor, Task, Weapon。

基于官方 cyber 示例（ew radar），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。There are 3 Cyber Demos.  Any resemblance or approximations to actual weapon system capabilities are purely coincidental.。覆盖组件：Cyber, ElectronicWarfare, Sensor, Weapon。

基于官方 satellite_demos 示例（dynamic link processor），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This directory contains various examples and demonstrations of AFSIM's satellite capability and satellite interaction with other platforms。覆盖组件：Comm, Platform, Processor, Space。
基于官方 space_operations 示例（intercept radar），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。Demonstrations for various space operations such as launch, maneuver, etc.。覆盖组件：Sensor, Space, Task, Weapon。
基于 AFSIM 官方 swarm 示例文件 uhf_ew_radar_sensor_platform.txt，生成对应的场景脚本。覆盖组件：ElectronicWarfare, Platform, Sensor, Swarm。

基于官方 alternate_locations 示例（common），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。Top level run file is run_course.txt. This scenario provides examples of how to utilize the alternate locations functionality within AFSIM. Platforms can be given a probabilistic choice of locations at which to be initialized in the beginning of a scenario. Additionally these locations do not have to be absolute but can be relative to other platforms. Often a threat platform's location is not concretely known from intelligence data. The threat may be frequently moved, may be a movable platform that relocates easily, or there may simply be a lack of data. All of these issues cause there to be an uncertainty in the placement of a platform at the start of a scenario run. It is necessary to implement some functionality such that platforms can have multiple alternate locations possible before the platform is instantiated for a given run of a simulation.。覆盖组件：Comm, Platform, Route。
基于 AFSIM 官方 base_types 示例文件 brawler_platform.txt，生成对应的场景脚本。覆盖组件：Mover, Platform, Processor。

基于官方 bearing_only 示例（commander platform），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This demo shows how to create a 3D track from two bearing-only sensors (with computed range) and provide The top level run file is test_run.txt. The bearing-only tracks provide bearing and elevation angles only (2D). Two methods of computing track location are provided (modify setup.txt to run either)。覆盖组件：Comm, Platform, Sensor。

基于官方 cislunar 示例（orbiter），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This scenario contains a single platform that orbits the moon using the WSF_INTEGRATING_SPACE_MOVER. This outputs a single replay file that can be used to examine the results of the orbit. The scenario also includes a mechanism to easily modify the initial conditions.。覆盖组件：Mover, Platform, Space。
基于官方 ciws 示例（ship），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。Top level run file is ciws.txt. A large part of this was taken from the gun engagement demo. Changes were:。覆盖组件：Platform, Task, Weapon。

基于官方 coverage_demos 示例（5th existing platform），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。Demonstration of the coverage capabilities in AFSIM. The demo is to be run using the startup files designated as 1st, 2nd, 3rd, etc. Each run will output data to the coverage_data folder. Coverage data can be viewed in the .csv files.。覆盖组件：Coverage, ElectronicWarfare, Platform。
基于 AFSIM 官方 iads 示例文件 ew_radar.txt，生成对应的场景脚本。覆盖组件：ElectronicWarfare, IADS, Sensor。
基于 AFSIM 官方 iads_c2_demos 示例文件 ew_radar.txt，生成对应的场景脚本。覆盖组件：ElectronicWarfare, IADS, Sensor。

基于官方 l16_j11 示例（dis network），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This directory contains the files necessary to run a weapon server demo with Link-16 network-enabled weapons. The jtids.txt file contains the JTIDS terminal and Link-16 computer definitions for both the weapon fighter platform and the network-enabled。覆盖组件：Comm, Platform, Weapon。

基于官方 launcher 示例（1st run），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This demo is meant to be a simple way of demonstrating a build up of tactics processor and launch computer to fire a sam. All launchers, sensors, and weapons are made up for this example.。覆盖组件：Processor, Sensor, Weapon。

基于 AFSIM 官方 six_dof_with_brawler 示例文件 pm6_brawler_route_comparison.txt，生成对应的场景脚本。覆盖组件：Mover, Processor, Route。

基于官方 visual_part 示例（red satellite），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。This demo directory demonstrates the use of WSF_VISUAL_PART, and the publishing of articulated parts to DIS.  There are two tanks with visual parts.  A script processor updates these to point at a aircraft using truth.  The dis_interface block allows the visual parts (or any articulated。覆盖组件：Platform, Processor, Space。

基于 AFSIM 官方 electronic_warfare 示例文件 closely_space_targets.txt，生成对应的场景脚本。覆盖组件：ElectronicWarfare, Space。
基于 AFSIM 官方 engage 示例文件 flight_route.txt，生成对应的场景脚本。覆盖组件：Route, Task。

基于官方 gun_engagement 示例（event output），生成 AFSIM 场景脚本。A script that creates a bullet weapon, launch computer, and then runs a test scenario on the bullet. The bullet demo runs at 100 Hz. It is not intended for mission level analysis. Future expansion could include bullet dispersion and bullet muzzle velocity variance.。覆盖组件：Task, Weapon。
